features.name: dff_with_enable_feedback_using_mux
features.description: Code should include a DFF with enable feedback pattern where the register conditionally updates itself or loads new data based on an enable signal, implemented via a $mux in the D input path

features.name: mux_with_constant_selector
features.description: Code should include a $mux cell with a constant selector signal, which should be optimized away but is not optimized by standard opt pass
features.snippet:
wire [1:0] mux_out;
assign mux_out = enable ? x : a;
